message:
fix: collect all cluster errors in DeployWorkload and ScaleWorkload (#10264)

Replace shared lastErr variable with an error slice (errs/scaleErrs)
protected by the existing mutex. Each goroutine appends its error to the
slice, and errors.Join combines them at the end so the response message
shows which cluster had which error instead of only the last one.

Fixes #10257

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
